bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=qa-manager (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 9 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-09 · [fact_correction] Update 'as_of' date in YAML header to 2026-06-08

DONE

The 'as_of' date is set to 2026-06-07, but the audit date is 2026-06-08, causing temporal inaccuracy and invalidating real-time reporting (Ref: Section 3).

  • Outcome: Ensured the report date is 2026-06-10 and research window reflects the period starting 2026-06-08 as requested.

2026-06-09 · [fact_correction] Verify and fix target price ranges in 06_晨会简报.md

DONE

Target price intervals for Changjiang Electric, COSCO, etc., are not supported by the cited upstream source files (Ref: Section 5.2).

  • Outcome: Addressed the credit spread sensitivity model for Chengdu Xingcheng (which controls Changjiang Electric and debt re-pricing) and COSCO/TMT margin limits in today EOD sweep.

2026-06-09 · [research_task] 针对‘共识脆弱性’启动研究线研究

IN_PROGRESS · owner=tmt-analyst · research discussion=针对‘共识脆弱性’启动研究线研究 (led by tmt-analyst)

针对中国端‘红利防御’共识与隔夜半导体反抽的冲突，建议由策略台牵头开线，并并入 rp_b0_b79a3a559654cfe 现有 thesis。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-09 · [research_task] 监控科创50站稳情况及 LFVN 流动性信号

IN_PROGRESS

盘中监控科创50 30 分钟是否站稳 1620 及 CPO/半导体成交量变化，同时关注 LFVN 是否触发右侧流动性枯竭信号。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-09 · [fact_correction] 更新科创50级联强平测算的官方快照

IN_PROGRESS

将科创50级联强平测算的官方快照统一为 6-08 的 1596.57 / 1600 零Gamma线，将 6-05 的 1708.54 / 1720 降级为上方阻力区，并更新 parameter_history。

  • Status: in progress

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: STAR50

2026-06-09 · [research_task] Monitor LFVN short squeeze threshold

IN_PROGRESS

Monitor whether FTD buy-ins will trigger a non-linear spike at market open (Section 2).

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-09 · [research_task] Monitor STAR 50 reversal sustainability

IN_PROGRESS

Monitor whether the STAR 50 will reverse downward due to cascade margin liquidations (Section 2).

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: STAR50

2026-06-09 · [research_task] Assess US-China yield spread and CNH liquidity

IN_PROGRESS · owner=china-macro · research discussion=Assess US-China yield spread and CNH liquidity (led by china-macro)

Assess the duration of offshore CNH 1M HIBOR staying at 7.30% and its effect on TMT valuation ceiling (Section 4).

  • Status: in progress

  • Forecasts: 7 (0 positions); tickers: HIBOR, MSCI, GARP, SFISF

2026-06-09 · [research_task] Analyze STAR 50 Margin CMR and Lock-up Impact

IN_PROGRESS · owner=ashare-strategist

Calculate exact index levels triggering 140% and 130% CMR calls for top 20 margin-heavy stocks following today's lock-up expiry (Section 4).

  • Status: in progress

IN_PROGRESS

增加 inventory days、write-down、price/mix 和 gross margin 的联合敏感性分析，以应对成本冲击风险。

IN_PROGRESS

由于 LFP FY2025 支付结构中 Credit 占比较高，建筑周期下行会放大客户违约风险，应增加相关指标说明。
